name: 贸易路线
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 文明互鉴 / Civilizational Interaction / Civilizations
curriculum_points: Students will trace historical and contemporary trade routes (e.g., Silk Road, modern shipping lanes) and identify the goods, ideas, and technologies exchanged along them.
Learners will assess the social, economic, and environmental impacts of trade, considering concepts of interdependence and sustainability.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
